message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "Confidentiality",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Potential unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information",
      "rationale": "If either party fails to adequately protect Confidential Information, it could lead to significant competitive harm and legal consequences.",
      "mitigation": "Implement strict access controls and regular training on confidentiality obligations for employees.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Indemnification",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Insufficient indemnification clauses",
      "rationale": "The indemnification clause may not cover all potential liabilities, leaving parties exposed to unforeseen claims.",
      "mitigation": "Review and expand the indemnification clause to cover a broader range of liabilities and ensure clarity.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Limitation of Liability",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Cap on liability may be too low",
      "rationale": "The $50,000 cap on liability may not be sufficient to cover potential damages from breaches, especially in high-stakes scenarios.",
      "mitigation": "Consider negotiating a higher liability cap based on the potential risks involved in the business relationship.",
      "confidence": 0.70
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Governing Law",
      "severity": "low",
      "issue": "Jurisdiction limitations",
      "rationale": "Disputes must be resolved in San Francisco, which may be inconvenient for one party and could lead to increased legal costs.",
      "mitigation": "Negotiate a more neutral jurisdiction or allow for arbitration as an alternative dispute resolution method.",
      "confidence": 0.60
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "Data Protection",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Non-compliance with data protection laws",
      "rationale": "Failure to comply with applicable data protection laws could result in significant fines and reputational damage.",
      "mitigation": "Conduct regular audits and ensure both parties have robust data protection policies in place.",
      "confidence": 0.80
    }
  ]
}
